content: Helped user debug a failing pytest fixture; traced it to an implicit event loop leak in an async test.
Proposed a database migration that dropped a column still referenced by a legacy cron job; user caught it in review before merge.
Wrote a clean refactor of the auth middleware; user approved with no changes.
Confidently suggested a regex that silently failed on unicode input; user found the bug two days later.
Explained monad laws using a concrete Python Maybe; user said the metaphor finally clicked.
Spent an hour on a race condition that turned out to be a missing `await` — obvious in hindsight.
Designed a rate limiter using a token bucket; chose Redis-backed impl but user's infra was single-node — overkill.
Noticed a PII leak in structured logs before it shipped; user thanked me.
